name: Lindy leather handbag
description:
Hermès Mini Lindy II - This piece is "Store Fresh," recently acquired from the Hermès boutique in the U.S.

This Lindy is crafted in Taurillon Clemence leather—highly sought after for its durable grain and beautiful slouch—in the iconic Etoupe (18). The classic neutral tone is accented with crisp white contrast stitching and high-polish Palladium hardware, which still retains all original protective plastics.

Product Specifications:

Condition: Store Fresh / Unworn 

Color: Etoupe (18)

Leather: Taurillon Clemence

Hardware: Palladium (Protective plastic intact)

Dimensions: 19cm x 12.5cm x 9cm

Stamp: G

Full Boutique Set Includes:
- Original Hermès Orange Box & Ribbon
- Dust Bag & Care Booklet
- Protective Felt
- Copy of Boutique Receipt 

Seller’s Note:
I am the original owner. This is a rare, collector-grade "holy grail" combination of the most popular size, color, and hardware.
